title: senecio alpivagus
intro: Senecio alpivagus, a perennial plant species, is a type of ragwort native to the European Alps. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which are known for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Traditional herbal preparations of Senecio alpivagus have been used to alleviate various health issues, such as skin irritations, respiratory problems, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. However, it's essential to note that excessive consumption of Senecio alpivagus may lead to liver damage and other adverse effects, making it crucial to use it under the guidance of a medical professional or experienced herbalist.
